sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_leadsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#

select * from e_leadsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
order by ldate desc

select count(*) from e_leadsinfo_t li LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on li.cdtid=ct.id where li.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
ct.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
($sql$)
li.ltitle like '%$ltitle$%'
li.lpointto like '%$lpointto$%'
li.lsource like '%$lsource$%'
li.lcontent like '%$lcontent$%'

select li.*,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName order by bm.id) as cdttypename,ct.cdtname,ct.cdtlevel from e_leadsinfo_t li LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on li.cdtid=ct.id LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where li.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
ct.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
($sql$)
li.ltitle like '%$ltitle$%'
li.lpointto like '%$lpointto$%'
li.lsource like '%$lsource$%'
li.lcontent like '%$lcontent$%'
GROUP BY li.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_leadsinfo_t (cdtid,ldate,ltitle,lsource,lpointto,lcontent,czqkgs,conneteventid,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,xscz,workinfoid,attachments) VALUES ($cdtid$,'$ldate$','$ltitle$','$lsource$','$lpointto$','$lcontent$','$czqkgs$',$conneteventid$,$validflag$,$addoperatorid$, '$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$xscz$',$workinfoid$,'$attachments$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_leadsinfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT l.*,e.etitle as conneteventname FROM e_leadsinfo_t l left join e_eventsinfo_t e on e.id=l.conneteventid WHERE l.validflag > 0 AND l.id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id

select count(*) from zfw_e_leadsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#

select * from zfw_e_leadsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
order by ldate desc

select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT l.*,e.etitle as conneteventname FROM zfw_e_leadsinfo_t l left join zfw_e_eventsinfo_t e on e.id=l.conneteventid WHERE l.validflag > 0 AND l.id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_e_leadsinfo_t SET validflag = $validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
